response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Fullstack Developer with over 15 years of progressive roles, including leadership positions at re:cinq and Optilyz. His expertise spans TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes), alongside secondary skills in Java/Kotlin and AI agent infrastructure. His background includes building scalable systems, optimizing performance, and contributing to open-source projects, aligning well with the job's requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern and secondary technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Java/Kotlin, AI agents)
Proven track record in designing and optimizing scalable systems (e.g., Direct Mail automation platform handling millions of mails annually)
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js (primary stack requirement) in recent roles
Primary stack (Nest.js, Vitest) not prominently featured in recent employment history
Some roles involve Dlang/Java, which may indicate less focus on TypeScript/Kotlin in recent years
